title: Extreme Weather Shelters - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SEVERE WEATHER KLAMATH COUNTY KLAMATH COUNTY EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on warming centers during a severe weather event. May offer additional warming resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Warming centers operate during the winter months and during severe weather advisories. Locations are open either throughout the winter season or when temperature thresholds are met. Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER KLAMATH COUNTY KLAMATH FAMILY WARMING CENTER THRIVE CHURCH OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offering overnight shelter throughout the winter season. 235 S Laguna Street Gymnasium Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Adults 18 and older and families with children under the age of 18, service animals allowed Hours: 7 days per week 6pm-10am, Monday December 1, 2025-Sunday, March 15, 2026 Email (541) 887-4233 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER DESCHUTES COUNTY LA PINE WARMING SHELTER BY THE DOOR AT LA PINE OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offering overnight shelter throughout the winter season. 16430 3rd Street La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and families with children. Well behaved pets are welcome; pets must remain with owner. Hours: 7 days per week 5pm-7am, Monday, December 1, 2025-Sunday, March 15, 2026 -Meals served from 6pm-7pm Email (541) 948-6649 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER KLAMATH COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER SEVERE WEATHER DESCHUTES COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER
